headline: Raised Guidance And AI Bookings Momentum Might Change The Case For Investing In Equinix (EQIX)
summary: Equinix recently reported first-quarter 2026 results showing net income of US$415 million versus US$343 million a year earlier, raised its full-year 2026 revenue outlook to US$10.14–US$10.24 billion, and affirmed a quarterly dividend of US$5.16 per share alongside slightly higher full‑year dividend guidance. At the same time, Equinix highlighted record annualized gross bookings, a growing backlog, and deepening AI-related demand, including capacity expansion projects and new partnerships...

headline: Hyperscalers Hit $700 Billion in 2026 AI Spending Plans
summary: On the latest Reuters Morning Bid podcast segment Powell era ends, hawks rise, the host flagged a milestone that sums up the entire 2026 market story: “the total spend now for 2026 from these big hyperscalers has now topped $700 billion.” The number, the host added, “is rising all the time” and “does mean more ... Hyperscalers Hit $700 Billion in 2026 AI Spending Plans

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Equinix, Raises Price Target to $1186
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Brett Knoblauch   maintains Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $1173 to $1186.
